overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing an armored character exploring ancient stone ruins in a lush forest environment. The character approaches a massive waterfall with a shipwreck embedded in it, accompanied by a small cat-like companion, then moves to a cliff edge overlooking a misty canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone ruins with waterfall approach

events.description: small cat-like companion creature appears from the left and begins following the player

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across cracked stone platforms toward a distant waterfall

notable_agents.action: small companion creature running alongside the player character

entered.detail: large cracked stone slabs forming the ground surface
massive waterfall visible through the mist in the distance
steep vegetated cliff face covered in trees and vines
small cat-like creature with orange and white fur wearing armor

segments.scene_description: The character walks across ancient stone ruins in a lush forest environment. A small cat-like companion joins from the left and follows alongside. In the distance, a massive waterfall becomes visible between the cliff walls.

events.description: character stops walking and looks up to observe the full height of the waterfall
camera pans upward following the character's gaze to reveal the top of the waterfall

agents.ego_description: standing before the waterfall, looking up at its full height and the shipwreck embedded within

notable_agents.action: companion standing nearby observing the waterfall with the player

entered.detail: massive wooden ship wreck embedded in the rocks behind the waterfall
water mist rising from the base of the waterfall creating atmospheric haze

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the base of the massive waterfall, revealing a large shipwreck structure embedded in the rock face behind the cascading water. The character stops to look up, and the camera pans upward to show the full height of the falls.

events.description: character turns away from the waterfall and begins walking toward a cliff edge

agents.ego_description: turning away from the waterfall and walking across the ruins toward a cliff edge

notable_agents.action: companion following closely behind the player character

entered.detail: tall ancient stone wall with vertical columns and weathered surfaces
edge of the stone platform dropping off into a misty canyon

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the waterfall and walks across the ancient ruins toward a cliff edge. Stone walls and pillars line the path as the waterfall recedes into the background.

events.description: character reaches the cliff edge and looks down into the misty canyon below
character pans view to the right to observe distant waterfalls in the canyon

agents.ego_description: standing at the cliff edge looking down into the misty canyon and observing the view

notable_agents.action: companion standing at the cliff edge looking down with the player

entered.detail: sheer drop at the edge of the stone platform revealing the canyon below
deep mist-filled canyon with steep walls extending downward
additional waterfalls visible in the distance within the canyon

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the cliff edge and looks down into a vast misty canyon. The view reveals distant waterfalls cascading down the canyon walls. The companion stands nearby at the edge as the character pans to take in the expansive scenery.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through ancient forest ruins that transitions from the intimate scale of a hidden waterfall to an expansive vista of a misty canyon. It begins with the character and a small cat-like companion walking across stone ruins, moving toward a massive waterfall visible between towering cliff walls. As the character reaches the base of the falls, the camera pans upward to reveal a large shipwreck embedded in the rock face behind the cascading water. The scene then shifts as the character turns away from the falls, traversing a path of stone walls and pillars while the waterfall recedes into the background. Finally, the camera reaches a cliff edge and opens up to a vast view of a misty canyon, where distant waterfalls cascade down the walls under an expansive sky.
